summary: Adjusted the chapter entry to stay anchored in Kai when Meridian arrives, and tightened the close so it lands on his bodily response to the unsigned contract instead of another alpine-weather exit beat.
edits: Reframed the opening sentence around Kai seeing the Meridian convoy from breakfast, preserving the same arrival information with a cleaner handoff from chapter 7's Kai-centered ending.
Removed the final exterior mountain image so the chapter exits on Kai pressing his hand over the unsigned binder, giving the ending a more distinct closing state from the adjacent quiet wind-down.
